overall.description: Static elevated shot of a dimly lit gothic classroom or great hall from a video game, featuring stone walls, tall arched windows, and students in dark robes seated at wooden desks. Atmospheric light filters through the windows as two students walk past the camera at different times.

segments.scene_description: A static elevated view of a gothic classroom interior with students seated at wooden desks arranged in rows. Tall arched windows on the left wall allow diffused light to illuminate the stone interior, while wall sconces provide additional ambient lighting. The scene remains calm with students quietly studying.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static elevated perspective of a dimly lit gothic classroom that remains atmospheric and still despite brief moments of movement. It begins with a view of students quietly studying at wooden desks, illuminated by diffused light from tall arched windows and ambient wall sconces. As the scene progresses, the stillness is momentarily interrupted when two students walk past the camera in the foreground, briefly occluding the view as they move from left to right. The camera then settles back into a completely stationary observation of the stone interior, where the seated students return to their quiet study. Finally, the shot lingers on the unchanging environment as the atmospheric light continues to filter through the windows over the silent hall.
